name: OWASP Dependency-Check
description: Detects publicly known vulnerabilities in project dependencies. Tool: https://owasp.org/www-project-dependency-check/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #163 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map OWASP Dependency-Check output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved OWASP Dependency-Check output file to parse instead of running it live.
